name: companions
description: Consult a panel of generated expert personas. Bundles the companions MCP server (discover, consult, check_balance) and a skill that nudges your agent to reach for it when a problem benefits from domain-expert perspectives — explicit asks, contested questions, or moments when you've hit a wall.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-persona analysis via the Companion Panel API
interface.longDescription: Consult a panel of generated expert personas. Bundles the companions MCP server (discover, consult, check_balance) and a skill that nudges your agent to reach for it when a problem benefits from domain-expert perspectives — explicit asks, contested questions, or moments when you've hit a wall.
defaultPrompt: Ask an expert panel to pressure-test this idea.
Consult domain experts on this tradeoff.
Get a second opinion from Companions.
